title: Tests: Add self-checking tests for tagged union features (#6867 partial)
body:
## Summary
Step 1 of 4 of the incremental approach for tagged union support per PR #6867.

Adds self-checking tests for tagged union functionality (IEEE 1800-2023):
- `t_tagged_union.v` - Union declaration, expressions, member access (21 tests)
- `t_tagged_case.v` - Case pattern matching, Section 12.6.1 (16 tests)
- `t_tagged_if.v` - If pattern matching, Section 12.6.2 (26 tests)

All three test files include full type coverage:
- Non-zero LSBs (`bit [8:1]`, etc.)
- 60-bit types (33-64 range special handling)
- 90-bit types (64+ range special handling)
- Opposite endianness (`bit [0:31]`, etc.)
- Unpacked arrays
- chandle members
- Class reference members
- real/shortreal members
- string members
- enum members
- event members (guarded with `ifndef VCS` due to VCS bug)
- `checkh` macro for assertions
- 2-space indentation per project style

### Test driver fix
Added truncation for "This fatal error may be caused..." line in `driver.py` to handle tests with many parse errors that exceed the parser threshold.

## Test plan
- [x] Tests pass on VCS with `-lca` flag (EDA Playground)
- [x] Fork CI passes
- [x] Upstream CI passes
